nasb.text: The king appointed Benaiah the son of Jehoiada over the army in his place, and the king appointed Zadok the priest in the place of Abiathar.

esv.text: The king put Benaiah the son of Jehoiada over the army in place of Joab, and the king put Zadok the priest in the place of Abiathar.

cnv.text: 王任命耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅取代約押統領軍隊；又任命撒督祭司取代亞比亞他的職位。

ccb.text: 王委派耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅替代约押为元帅，命撒督祭司代替亚比亚他。
